title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
ARCHITECTURE.md has been significantly updated (102 lines changed) and now documents most previously-missing modules. Remaining work:

1. [STALE] Known limitation #5 says "runtime/memory.js 待实现" but memory.js IS implemented with 26 passing tests. Remove this limitation.

2. Review if any remaining architecture gaps (embed.js adapters formal API section, sense.js full API) still need brief additions.

The 85% → 90% gap should close once the stale limitation is removed and a re-evaluation is triggered.
